name: com.superanretan.remotecontrol
description: Universal local Wi-Fi remote control system for Unity. One build = Host (3D scene), another = Controller (UI). Commands sent over Unity Transport, deserialized from JSON, dispatched to handlers via ScriptableObject event channels. No singletons, no static, handler-based.

samples.description: Host scene with a color-changing cube and Controller scene with UI buttons. Demonstrates the full command pipeline over local Wi-Fi.
